item.title: Snow Cream Straight from the Roof
item.description: Try a fun winter treat by making snow cream with fresh snow. A simple, playful recipe for a sweet homemade delight.

media:content.media:title: Snow Cream Straight from the Roof
media:content.media:description: Try a fun winter treat by making snow cream with fresh snow. A simple, playful recipe for a sweet homemade delight.

item.title: Master Snow Plowing Like a Pro
item.description: Learn practical tips for clearing roads and driveways efficiently. Step-by-step advice to make snow plowing faster, safer, and more effective.

media:content.media:title: Master Snow Plowing Like a Pro
media:content.media:description: Learn practical tips for clearing roads and driveways efficiently. Step-by-step advice to make snow plowing faster, safer, and more effective.

item.title: It’s Always Something with Carlos
item.description: Another unexpected moment on the job with Carlos keeps the team on their toes. A lighthearted look at the daily challenges and humor on site.

media:content.media:title: It’s Always Something with Carlos
media:content.media:description: Another unexpected moment on the job with Carlos keeps the team on their toes. A lighthearted look at the daily challenges and humor on site.

item.title: Keys Lost in Fresh Concrete
item.description: A set of keys accidentally ended up in freshly poured concrete. A real jobsite mishap and how the team handled this unexpected challenge.

media:content.media:title: Keys Lost in Fresh Concrete
media:content.media:description: A set of keys accidentally ended up in freshly poured concrete. A real jobsite mishap and how the team handled this unexpected challenge.

item.title: Who Wants to Work Saturdays?
item.description: Facing the challenge of Saturday work, the crew navigates overtime and busy schedules. A glimpse into the realities of construction and dedication on the job.

media:content.media:title: Who Wants to Work Saturdays?
media:content.media:description: Facing the challenge of Saturday work, the crew navigates overtime and busy schedules. A glimpse into the realities of construction and dedication on the job.

item.title: Clearing Snow Chaos in the Lot
item.description: Tackling heavy snowfall to keep the parking lot safe and accessible. A behind-the-scenes look at the effort and strategy involved in winter lot maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Clearing Snow Chaos in the Lot
media:content.media:description: Tackling heavy snowfall to keep the parking lot safe and accessible. A behind-the-scenes look at the effort and strategy involved in winter lot maintenance.

item.title: Nobody Came, So I Did
item.description: When the team didn’t show up during a snowstorm, I stepped in to keep things moving. A look at determination, responsibility, and getting the job done.

media:content.media:title: Nobody Came, So I Did
media:content.media:description: When the team didn’t show up during a snowstorm, I stepped in to keep things moving. A look at determination, responsibility, and getting the job done.

item.title: Old School Buggy vs. Steep Hill
item.description: Watch a classic buggy tackle a steep hill, showcasing its power and agility. A fun look at vintage off-road driving and challenging terrain.

media:content.media:title: Old School Buggy vs. Steep Hill
media:content.media:description: Watch a classic buggy tackle a steep hill, showcasing its power and agility. A fun look at vintage off-road driving and challenging terrain.
